zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli於0990年出生時，他的父親Sieur de Busli-17歲，母親Beatrice de Deincourt-21歲。他和Muriel de Chappell至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1099年1月17日在英國越可爾迪可爾享年109歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Busli
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (northern): patronymic or plural form of a medieval personal name Buso, but in some case it may be a nickname from the dialect word buso ‘hole’ and as adjective ‘empty, shallow’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli was born in 0990, his father, Sieur de Busli, was -17 and his mother, Beatrice de Deincourt, was -21. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Muriel de Chappell. He died on 17 January 1099, in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 109.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli est né en 0990, son père, Sieur de Busli, avait -17 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Deincourt, avait -21 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Muriel de Chappell. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1099, à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 109 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli 0990 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sieur de Busli -17 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Deincourt -21. Er hatte mit Muriel de Chappell mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1099 im Alter von 109 Jahren in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli è nato il nel 0990, il suo padre, Sieur de Busli, aveva -17 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Deincourt, aveva -21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Muriel de Chappell. Morì il 17 gennaio 1099, nel Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 109 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Tickhill Roger de Busliが0990年に生まれた時，父Sieur de Busliは-17歳，母Beatrice de Deincourtは-21歳であった。彼はMuriel de Chappellとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1099年1月17日にイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルで109歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli(이)가 0990년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sieur de Busli(은)는 -17세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Deincourt(은)는 -21세였다. 그는 Muriel de Chappell(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1099년 1월 17일 영국 요르크실르 티크힐에서 109세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli nasceu em 0990, seu pai, Sieur de Busli, tinha -17 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Deincourt, tinha -21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Muriel de Chappell. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1099, em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 109 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli родился в 0990 г., его отцу по имени Sieur de Busli было -17 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Deincourt, -21. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Muriel de Chappell. Он умер 17 января 1099 г. в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 109 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Tickhill Roger de Busli nació en 0990, su papá, Sieur de Busli, tenía -17 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Deincourt, tenía -21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Muriel de Chappell. Murió el 17 de enero de 1099, en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 109 años.
